docs.title: About this site
docs.text:
This site is a rough demonstration of my studies at the University of Newcastle, where I studied a double Bachelor's degree in Mathematics and Computer Science.

This website is an ongoing project, but I hope to cover as much of my knowledge as possible for the more advanced subjects.

docs.title: Roadmap
docs.text: This page serves as a general guide to the various topics and subjects that I wish to write about. This list is likely to change and new points may be added or removed at any time.
